description_long: This house is a modern, single-story residential building with a flat roof and a geometric, rectilinear layout. The structure is surrounded by landscaped greenery, including rows of trees and shrubs along the perimeter and driveway. The exterior features a mix of dark and light wall finishes, with large window openings that suggest an emphasis on natural light and open interior spaces. Two large, block-like structures flank the main house, possibly serving as garages or auxiliary rooms. The property includes a paved driveway and walkways leading to the main entrance, which is centrally located and visually prominent. The overall design is minimalist, with clean lines and a focus on functional outdoor spaces.
description: A modern, single-story house with a flat roof, geometric layout, and landscaped surroundings, featuring large windows and a central entryway.
description_view_0: Front view showing the main entrance, landscaped driveway, and symmetrical rows of trees along the street.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the block-like auxiliary structures and the paved driveway leading to the house.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the open backyard area, additional outdoor spaces, and the back facade of the house.
description_view_3: Opposite side view emphasizing the driveway, auxiliary structures, and the arrangement of trees along the street.
attribute_entryway_design: Central entryway with a wide door, paved approach, and minimal overhang, flanked by landscaping.
